title: premna protrusa
intro: Premna protrusa, also known as 'Kanwara', is a medicinal plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Premna protrusa include reducing inflammation, treating cold and cough, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Premna protrusa is often used in herbal preparations like decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
